summary: Regenerated release-manifest, inventory, and checksum layers from the live repository tree.
Removed stale release-note artifacts and resolved duplicate Soreheim roster labeling.
Rebuilt polity rosters, master NPC ledgers, hook banks, and current-release views from the source NPC records.
Expanded named-NPC manner and hidden-pressure coverage across the full corpus, with direct-canon appearance enrichments where explicit source support exists.
